title: ansible.playbook Facet
description: The OBSERVED metadata of a raw Ansible playbook file, projected read-only by the ansible-project Connector (§1.2) — a foreign artifact (a playbook file stays a playbook), never a Stratt Named Kind. Demanded by that Connector's playbook-facet projection Contract (its manifest ContractDecl): shipping this schema hardens the write seam — every projected playbook facet is now validated (covered), §1.1 progressive hardening. It is METADATA only (name/path/plays/hosts) — never a reinterpretation of Ansible's execution model (the §9 no-new-language line). NOTE (ADR-0085): the orphan-template Baseline is the motivating governance consumer but is NOT the §1.1 demander — a relation-presence check reads no content; a writer demands the schema. plays is the play count; hosts are the host patterns the plays target (observed, not resolved). Closed (§9).
